meta.source: vignanam.org — IAST transliteration, corrected against Chris Hughes lineage
meta.notes: v1.1: Parameshvara-Parameshvari combined; Uddiishamayi added; Kaalataapaana corrected; Garima Siddhe removed; translation and note fields added.

sections.label: Nava Chakreshvari
sections.description: The nine Tripura forms, one per circuit

scripts.iast: ōṃ aiṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ aiṃ klīṃ sauḥ ōṃ namastripurasundarī
scripts.english: Om Aim Hrim Shrim Aim Klim Sauh Om Namas Tripura Sundari

scripts.translation: The Divine God and Divine Goddess

deities.note: Chanted as a pair — the primordial divine couple
Garima Siddhe removed per lineage v1.1 — 10 Siddhi Shaktis

scripts.translation: Enchantress of the Three Worlds — Presiding Deity
Fulfiller of All Hopes — Presiding Deity
Bestower of All Good Fortune — Presiding Deity
Maker of All that is Beloved
Accomplisher of All Goals — Presiding Deity
Remover of All Disease — Presiding Deity
Bestower of All Perfections — Presiding Deity
The Great Empress — Lalita Mahatripura Sundari
Beautiful Goddess of the Three Worlds
Garlanded Goddess of the Three Worlds
Perfected Goddess of the Three Worlds
The Great Beautiful Goddess of the Three Worlds

scripts.english: Maha Maha Shri Chakra Nagara Samrajni
scripts.translation: Great Great Empress of the Shri Chakra City

lines.label: Horizontal mid-line (left to right)
lines.note: Deities aligned horizontally across circuits 4–7. Positions TBD — confirm against SVG geometry.

lines.label: Vertical mid-line (bottom to top)
lines.note: Deities aligned vertically across circuits 4–7. Positions TBD — confirm against SVG geometry.
